source_exhibit: Exhibit B — Franchise Agreement (96 pages, 20 Articles)

grant_and_term.conditions: Sign then-current agreement (may be materially different), general release, successor fee, not in default, all fees paid

fee_and_payment_obligations.royalty: Greater of $1,000 or 6% of Gross Revenue per month
fee_and_payment_obligations.reporting: Gross Revenue by 5th of month; royalty due 15th
fee_and_payment_obligations.late_payment: 1.5% per month or highest lawful rate + $50/day
fee_and_payment_obligations.withholding_unlawful: Cannot withhold payments as offset or otherwise
fee_and_payment_obligations.no_right_to_set_off: Section 20.9 — no right to set off claims against amounts owed

site_selection_and_office.location: Home office or industrial/commercial space within territory
site_selection_and_office.home_office_limit: 6 months maximum unless authorized in writing
site_selection_and_office.franchisor_approval: Not required for site selection but must present professional image
site_selection_and_office.inspection_right: Franchisor can inspect at any time

training_obligations.initial: Primary Owner + Principal Operator + 1 other must attend and complete to satisfaction
training_obligations.classroom: 76-144 hours (Salt Lake City or Las Vegas)
training_obligations.failure_consequence: Must designate replacement; if Primary Owner fails, franchisor may terminate (40% fee refund)
training_obligations.ongoing: Refresher/additional training as franchisor determines; annual conference mandatory
training_obligations.cost: Franchisee bears all travel/lodging/meals; additional training $800/day

operational_obligations.manuals_compliance: Must comply with all manuals, which franchisor can unilaterally modify
operational_obligations.best_efforts: Must use best efforts to promote and conduct Business
operational_obligations.principal_operator_required: Full-time; daily presence at office; no other business activities
operational_obligations.records_access: Franchisor has independent access to all data, accounting, email
operational_obligations.inspections: Franchisor may inspect at any time without prior notice
operational_obligations.audits: Franchisor may audit at any time; 2%+ understatement triggers cost reimbursement
operational_obligations.secret_shoppers: Franchisor may use secret shoppers periodically
operational_obligations.software_mandatory: YESCO Software, enterprise email, Servizio apps required

immediate_no_cure: Abandonment (7 consecutive days or intent to cease)
Felony conviction or moral turpitude crime
Failure to pay within 5 days after notice
Failure to submit reports within 5 days after notice
Misuse of Marks/System — 10 days after notice
4 written defaults during term + any further default
Violation of government law not cured within government's cure period
Failure to meet Territory Sales Quota
Negotiating with National Accounts Program Customer without consent
Violation of covenant with its own cure provision — failure to cure
Second violation of territory operation rules (Section 2.3.3)
Default under any other agreement with franchisor
termination_triggers.30_day_cure: Any other breach of term, covenant, or condition of Agreement

transfer_restrictions.conditions: 13 specific conditions (11.3.4 a-m) including compliance, payment, training, fee, release, transition plan
transfer_restrictions.transfer_fee: Greater of $5,000 or 4% of last year GR
transfer_restrictions.reduced_fee_among_owners: $2,500 if <25% equity transferred to new owners
transfer_restrictions.controlled_entity_transfer: Allowed without consent if 100% owned, entity confined to business, joint and several liability
transfer_restrictions.involuntary_transfer_prohibited: Bankruptcy, assignment for creditors, encumbrance — grounds for termination
transfer_restrictions.no_advertising_of_sale: Cannot advertise sale without prior written consent

default_and_cross_default.cross_default: Default under any other agreement between franchisee and franchisor is default under FA
default_and_cross_default.cross_default_note: Default under promissory note is default under FA, and vice versa
default_and_cross_default.acceleration: Entire balance of installment obligations accelerated on default
default_and_cross_default.post_termination_operation: Continued use of marks/system triggers disgorgement of profits or equivalent royalties

noncompete_scope.during_term: Franchisee and owners cannot operate similar business anywhere
noncompete_scope.post_term_geography: Own territory or territory of any other franchisee
noncompete_scope.no_disclosure: May never reveal any component of System
noncompete_scope.employee_nonsolicitation: Cannot hire, recruit, or attempt to hire employees of franchisor, affiliates, or other franchisees during term + 2 years
noncompete_scope.customer_nonsolicitation: Cannot solicit customers of any YESCO business for 2 years post-term
noncompete_scope.reasonable_restriction_clause: Savings clause — if overly broad, court may modify to be enforceable

guaranty_scope.who_must_sign: All Principal Owners (5%+ interest), spouses/future spouses, anyone who co-signed loans
guaranty_scope.scope: Joint and several personal guaranty of all franchisee obligations

indemnification.scope: Franchisee indemnifies franchisor, affiliates, and all their officers/directors/employees/agents
indemnification.covers: All claims arising from franchisee's operation, property, negligence, use of marks/system, performance/non-performance
indemnification.includes: Awards, damages, consequential damages, attorney fees, investigation costs, court costs, travel
indemnification.defense_obligation: Franchisee must defend; franchisor may hire own counsel at franchisee's expense
indemnification.workers_comp_limitation_waived: Indemnity not limited by workers comp or disability benefit acts
indemnification.survival: Continues after termination/expiration for applicable limitations period

dispute_resolution.pre_litigation: Face-to-face meeting at franchisor office, then non-binding mediation (optional)
dispute_resolution.exceptions: Injunctive relief, actions based on Marks or noncompete not subject to mediation
dispute_resolution.venue: Salt Lake County, Utah (subject to state addenda)
dispute_resolution.limitation_of_action: 1 year from discovery or should have discovered (Section 18.11)
dispute_resolution.punitive_damages_waiver: Both parties waive right to punitive, exemplary, multiplied or consequential damages (Section 18.10)
dispute_resolution.franchisor_reasonable_business_judgment: Franchisor decisions made in reasonable business judgment are not arbitrary (Section 18.8)

insurance_requirements.cgl: $1M per occurrence, $2M aggregate (per project), $2M products/completed ops, $10K medical
insurance_requirements.additional_insured: Franchisor, affiliates, and their respective directors/officers/employees/agents
insurance_requirements.subcontractor_coverage: Must require subcontractors to maintain same coverages
insurance_requirements.franchisor_procurement_right: May procure insurance on franchisee's behalf + 15% admin fee

force_majeure.scope: Limited — only referenced in context of abandonment exception (Section 12.1.1): 'acts of God, fire, flood, earthquake, or other similar causes beyond your control and not related to the availability of funds'
force_majeure.note: Very narrow. Only applies to prevent termination for abandonment. Does not broadly excuse performance.

distinctive_clauses.description: Cannot use system information for machine learning, AI training, algorithm improvement, or generative AI platforms without written consent
Franchisee irrevocably appoints franchisor as attorney-in-fact for business operations, telephone transfers, and vehicle modifications upon termination
Must change vehicle color from red and remove all marks. Franchisor may tow/impound vehicles and make modifications at franchisee's expense.
No payment for goodwill on termination/expiration. Fair Market Value purchase excludes goodwill.
Before suing franchisor, must give 60 days written notice and opportunity to cure (plus additional 60 days if diligently curing)

distinctive_clauses.clause: Customer List and Trades List as Franchisor Property
distinctive_clauses.description: All customer and trades lists generated through the business are franchisor's sole and exclusive property, returned on termination
